top_5_fixes: Lock scoring precision policy (e.g., 2-decimal computed score, 1-decimal declared score) and document rounding rule in readiness_scorecard metadata.
Add explicit evidence IDs and baseline comparators for each readiness_scorecard dimension to improve audit traceability.
Tie each risk_register trigger to a named monitoring source and alert SLA to strengthen operational enforceability.
Add quantitative dependency health indicators in roadmap_3_year to make dependency coherence continuously measurable.
Define investor diligence data room checklist with artifact owners and refresh cadence to keep investor_pack completeness durable.
